seoTitle: Pomona Unified Calendar 2025-2026: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: Pomona Unified 2025-2026 calendar with Aug 12 first day, May 29 last day, student-free days, Thanksgiving, Winter Break, Spring Break and ICS.
calendarNotes: Pomona Unified does not list an official 2025-2026 PDF URL in the provided source set; the reviewed local PDF was generated from official calendar information. The first day of school is August 12, 2025 and is listed as a shortened day for all students. Professional development student-free days are listed August 6-8, September 11, November 4, and January 22. Winter Break runs December 22, 2025 through January 2, 2026. Spring Break runs March 30 through April 3, 2026. Elementary school parent conferences run October 16-24, 2025 and March 12-20, 2026. The last day of school is May 29, 2026 and is listed as a shortened day for all students.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Pomona Unified start school in 2025?
calendarFaqs.a: Pomona Unified starts the 2025-2026 school year on Tuesday, August 12, 2025. The calendar lists this as a shortened day for all students.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Pomona Unified Winter Break in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter Break runs Monday, December 22, 2025 through Friday, January 2, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Pomona Unified Spring Break in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 30 through Friday, April 3, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Pomona Unified in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school is Friday, May 29, 2026. The calendar lists it as a shortened day for all students.

calendarFaqs.q: Is Pomona Unified closed during Thanksgiving week?
calendarFaqs.a: Pomona Unified lists schools not in session for Thanksgiving week from November 24-28, 2025.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Pomona Unified have early dismissal days?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. The 2025-2026 calendar lists shortened days for all students, elementary students, and high school students.

calendarFaqs.q: Can I add the Pomona Unified calendar to Google Calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. MySchoolDates provides an ICS calendar file that can be imported into Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Outlook. The file is a one-time import, so families should verify later changes with the official Pomona Unified calendar source.

customSections.label: Family Planning Guide for Pomona Unified 2025-2026
customSections.content: Beyond major holidays, families should pay attention to student-free days, shortened schedules, and conference periods that may affect childcare, transportation, and pickup routines. Winter Break and Spring Break are the main vacation-planning windows, while professional development days, shortened days, and elementary parent conference periods may require shorter-term childcare coverage.

rows: Longer school breaks are the safest windows for family travel planning.
Students do not attend even when staff report, so families may need coverage.
Dismissal and after-school coverage may change by grade level or campus.
Both dates affect semester closeout and shortened-day planning.

customSections.label: Pomona Unified No-School Days Summary
customSections.content: Pomona Unified no-school days include district holidays, student-free professional development days, teacher work days, and the major break periods shown in the calendar. Families should distinguish full student-free dates from shortened days because shortened days still include student attendance but may require different pickup, transportation, or after-school arrangements.

rows: Students do not attend; staff schedules may still be active.
Labor Day, Veterans Day, MLK Day, Presidents holidays, Memorial Day
Useful for family schedule and childcare planning.
Thanksgiving week, Winter Break, Spring Break
Longer no-school periods for travel and childcare coverage.

customSections.label: Pomona Unified Shortened Days and Early Dismissal
customSections.content: The Pomona Unified calendar lists multiple shortened-day patterns, including shortened days for all students, elementary students, and high school students. Families should verify dismissal times with the assigned school because shortened-day schedules can vary by grade level, campus, and conference or exam window.

rows: Affects districtwide pickup and after-school routines.
Elementary dismissal timing may differ from normal school days.
Listed monthly and near semester close
High school families should check class and final-exam schedules.

customSections.label: Pomona Unified Calendar Review Information
customSections.content: This page was last reviewed on July 22, 2026 against Pomona Unified 2025-2026 calendar information available in the reviewed source set. MySchoolDates checked the first day, last day, student-free professional development days, teacher work days, shortened days, winter break, spring break, elementary conference periods, grading-period dates, downloadable files, and official source links.

customSections.label: How This Pomona Unified Calendar Was Prepared
customSections.content: This Pomona Unified calendar page is prepared from district school calendar information. MySchoolDates extracts and reviews first and last student days, holidays and break periods, student-free days, shortened days, conference windows, grading-period dates, and downloadable calendar files. Dates are checked against available district calendar source information before publication.

yearNumbers.label: First Day
yearNumbers.detail: Families should note that the first student day is also listed as a shortened day for all students.

yearNumbers.label: Winter Break
yearNumbers.detail: Winter Break runs December 22, 2025 through January 2, 2026.
